summary: Iteration 181: Payment History & Receipts feature testing complete. All 10 backend tests pass (2 skipped due to auth fixture). Frontend testing verified: Payment History page loads correctly with summary cards, filter tabs, payment list, receipt download buttons, back navigation, and contact support link. PDF receipt download works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment History page correctly implements all required features: summary dashboard, filter tabs, payment list with receipts
PDF receipt generation uses reportlab and produces valid PDF files with proper Content-Disposition headers
All payment history endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)
Dashboard sidebar correctly includes 'Payment History' button with data-testid='payment-history-btn'
Filter tabs correctly filter payments: All (20), Confirmed (12), Pending (8)
Receipt download buttons only appear for completed payments (12 buttons for 12 completed payments)
Login endpoint still works correctly after rate limiting changes to auth.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 181 verified Payment History & Receipts feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/payments/history returns 20 payments (12 completed, 8 pending) with correct fields (payment_id, case_id, feature_type, feature_name, amount, currency, method, reference, status, created_at), (2) GET /api/payments/history/summary returns total_spent=$1646, completed_payments=12, features_unlocked_count=3, cases_with_payments=4, (3) GET /api/payments/receipt/{payment_id}/pdf generates valid PDF with proper headers, (4) All endpoints return 401 without auth, (5) Frontend Payment History page has all required data-testid attributes and works correctly, (6) Dashboard sidebar has 'Payment History' button that navigates to /payment-history, (7) Login still works after rate limiting changes.

payment_history.GET /api/payments/history (valid): PASS - returns 20 payments with correct structure
payment_history.GET /api/payments/history/summary (valid: PASS - returns total_spent, completed_payments, features_unlocked_count, cases_with_payments

receipt_pdf.GET /api/payments/receipt/{payment_id}/p: PASS - returns PDF with correct headers

payment_history_page.summary_cards: PASS - Total Spent ($1646.00), Completed (12), Features Unlocked (3), Cases (4)
payment_history_page.filter_tabs: PASS - All (20), Confirmed (12), Pending (8) tabs work correctly
payment_history_page.receipt_buttons: PASS - 12 receipt download buttons for completed payments
